strategy_doc_section_loaded: M6 in detail — spot gaps, build the loop (+ Mood arc + Recurring themes + Woven design rules)

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Lead with discipline, not failure mode
Strategic themes recur in Key Concepts
Key Concepts shape — theme breadcrumbs, not a standalone section
What You'll Learn shape — capability register, not syllabus
rules_evaluated.evidence: line:14: '**Diagnose** the packaged Module 5 run alongside the un-packaged Module 4 baseline, name gaps the three-pattern didn't anticipate, quoted from your own artefacts' — mechanism tail ('quoted from your own artefacts') and object-leads-with-destination shape ('the packaged Module 5 run alongside…') obscure the discipline; 'Diagnose' is arguably academic-register for a Bloom taxonomy rather than a strategic-theme verb. line:18: '**Map** evals across three surfaces, verifier in your repo, judge in your test, gate in your CI. Anchored by Ramp Dojo and Intercom Tier 1/2/3' — the mechanism tail listing all three surfaces ('verifier in your repo, judge in your test, gate in your CI') is apparatus; the anchor callout ('Anchored by Ramp Dojo and Intercom Tier 1/2/3') is an author-defence aside. line:17: '**Author** a session-shaper skill through conversation, sharpened-verifier, judge, or gap-finder shape based on what the two runs demanded; self-critique; invoke on the packaged run; ship to personal ~/.claude/skills/' — mechanism tail runs far past the verb+immediate-object contract; semicolons stack mechanism steps; the path name (~/.claude/skills/) is apparatus that belongs in exercise body, not a What You'll Learn bullet. line:19: '**Name** one key learning and one open question on the future in the Debrief round' — didactic taxonomy stamp; 'Name' here is facilitation-register (L&D / Bloom) rather than a strategic-theme verb. The bullet describes what a debrief facilitator captures, not what an engineer walks away able to do.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Strip mechanism tails from Diagnose, Author, and Map bullets to verb + immediate object only; replace Name (Debrief facilitation register) with a strategic-theme verb that names the capability the student retains after the round (e.g. the open question they carry); remove the path reference from Author bullet; remove anchor callout from Map bullet.
